function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-29
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-29                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

function.message: Processed the next inbox note and completed the OCR/frontmatter migration for `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_29__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md`. Added invoice YAML frontmatter per schema from visible data, kept the existing note body intact below frontmatter, and deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read system workflow + schema docs before task work, respected OCR migration rule to preserve original body verbatim, and removed inbox item after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR frontmatter extraction for the specified invoice. The target file was read, structured fields were directly extracted from its visible tables, written to YAML using the invoice schema in `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, and the original body content was preserved beneath frontmatter. Completion cleanup was performed by deleting the processed inbox file per `process-next-inbox-item.md` and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
